scores.correctness_notes: Covers most hooks well but omits action events (<name>_action/ActionEvent), collect_app_status, collect_unit_status, collect_metrics, and meter_status_changed/add_metrics. These are notable omissions from the complete list.
scores.hallucination_notes: Minor inaccuracy: 'leader-settings-changed: Non-leader units are notified of leadership changes' — it actually fires when the leader changes settings via leader-set, not merely when leadership changes. Also omits that leader-settings-changed is deprecated since ops 2.4.0 and pre/post-series-upgrade are deprecated without flagging them as such.
